messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Fix the pending-review value drift and active-only scan so approve-from-Telegram actually fires
What it solves: THE FEATURE IS ALREADY BUILT AND WIRED (BL-357) BUT DEAD. Outbound,
conciergeTick posts an approval request into the ticket's topic
(`pendingApprovalFor` -> ApprovalRequested); inbound, a topic reply
matching `isApprovalReplyText` calls `recordApprovalReply`, which flips
the ticket's `human_approva…
How it works: A pending-review ticket is recognized as pending, not unset
